Gredos.title: Los Galayos, Trad Climbing Area
Gredos.note: Comprehensive route database for the ~40 granite spires of Los Galayos, listing 400+ trad routes from 1-8 pitches with grades and topos.

Gredos.title: Galayos Area Guide
Gredos.note: Area page with driving directions from Madrid, the approach to Victory refuge, rack/gear recommendations, lodging options, and best-season advice.

Gredos.title: Dos años de actividad en Galayos
Gredos.note: Spanish climbing news trip report on new route activity across Los Galayos towers (2016-2018), including named routes, grades, and local ethics.

Gredos.title: Sierra de Gredos Rock Climbing Guidebook
Gredos.note: Publisher page for the Desnivel guidebook covering the best 100 multi-pitch routes (IV-6b) across the wider Sierra de Gredos range, including the Galayos towers.

Gredos.title: Climbing in Galayos, Torozo and Villarejo
Gredos.note: Overview of trad climbing across the wider Gredos granite area (Galayos, El Torozo, Villarejo) with meeting points and refuge logistics.

Écrins (Aiguille Dibona).title: Aiguille Dibona area page (waypoint / route database)
Écrins (Aiguille Dibona).note: Collaborative topo database entry for the Aiguille Dibona summit, linking to its many routes, access notes, and difficulty grades.

Écrins (Aiguille Dibona).title: Aiguille Dibona crag logbook
Écrins (Aiguille Dibona).note: UKC crag page listing routes on the Dibona (Normal Route, Voie du Nain, Visite Obligatoire, Lady Bona, etc.) with approach time from Refuge du Soreiller and user logbook entries.

Écrins (Aiguille Dibona).title: Aiguille Dibona, Rock climbing
Écrins (Aiguille Dibona).note: Area page listing dozens of trad and sport routes at Aiguille Dibona with grades, star ratings, and a linked guidebooks section.

Écrins (Aiguille Dibona).title: Le refuge du Soreiller
Écrins (Aiguille Dibona).source: Destination Parc national des Écrins (official park site)
Écrins (Aiguille Dibona).note: Official approach description and practical info for Refuge du Soreiller, the hut used as base camp for Aiguille Dibona climbing.

Écrins (Aiguille Dibona).title: Climbing the Aiguille Dibona in Écrins National Park, France
Écrins (Aiguille Dibona).note: First-hand trip report from a multi-day stay at Refuge du Soreiller covering routes climbed (Visite Obligatoire and others), conditions, and rock quality.

Aladaglar.title: Aladaglar Mountains Turkey — climber Q&A thread
Aladaglar.note: First-hand beta thread naming Demirkazık, Kızılkaya, Yedigöller, Direktaş and Parmakkaya, access via Demirkazik village/Sokullupınar, guidebook recommendations, and contact for the Ince family's camp.

Aladaglar.title: Rock climbing and sport climbing in Aladağlar, Turkey
Aladaglar.note: Area overview covering Cimbar Valley, Pinarbasi Canyon and Kazikli Valley sport crags plus 150+ multi-pitch alpine routes (200-650m), access/season/accommodation logistics.

Aladaglar.title: Aladaglar Rock Climbing Guidebook and Topo
Aladaglar.note: Product page for Recep Ince's 232-page English-language guidebook covering 450+ sport routes and 65 multi-pitch alpine routes with photo topos and grades.

Aladaglar.title: Rock Climbing in Aladaglar National Park
Aladaglar.note: Area page listing sub-sectors (Cımbar Valley, Kazikli Ali Canyon, Pınarbaşı Canyon, Yelatan) with ~103 documented routes and grades.

Aladaglar.title: Taurus Mountains Aladağlar: Technical Guide to Turkey's Alpine Heart
Aladaglar.note: Detailed technical guide covering sectors (Demirkazık/North, Yedigöller Plateau), a 5-day traverse itinerary, water sources, season/permits, and gear checklist.

Picos de Europa.title: Picu Urriellu / Naranjo de Bulnes area page
Picos de Europa.note: Route database for Naranjo de Bulnes with dozens of logged multi-pitch trad/mixed routes (250m-700m+), grades from moderate to 8c.

Picos de Europa.title: UKC Destination Guide: Picos de Europa
Picos de Europa.note: Overview article covering the four faces of Naranjo de Bulnes, route grades (HS to extreme), best season (June-Sept), and descent/abseil info.

Picos de Europa.title: Vega de Urriellu / Refugio de Urriellu hut booking
Picos de Europa.note: Official-style booking and info page for the Refugio de Urriellu hut at the base of Naranjo de Bulnes, with bunk capacity, pricing and season dates.

Picos de Europa.title: Pico Urriellu / Naranjo de Bulnes climbing area
Picos de Europa.note: Area page listing specific multi-pitch routes (e.g. Directa de los Martinez, Murciana 78) with grades, approach via Sotres, and hut approach times.

Picos de Europa.title: Climbing in the Picos de Europa (trip report)
Picos de Europa.note: Detailed first-hand trip report with real route/pitch beta across Naranjo de Bulnes, Peña de Fresnidiello, Pico Torres and Gilbo, plus base-town and guidebook recommendations.

Tenerife.title: Tenerife, Rock climbing (area hub)
Tenerife.note: Central database of all Tenerife climbing areas, including Teide National Park, Guaria and other multi-pitch trad crags.

Tenerife.title: El Catedral crag logbook
Tenerife.note: Details the 2200m-altitude Teide National Park crag with 15 mostly-traditional 1-4 pitch granite/ignimbrite routes.

Tenerife.title: Guaria crag access and route info
Tenerife.note: Covers permit requirements, approach, and multi-pitch trad/sport climbing at Tenerife's tallest and most concentrated multi-pitch crag.

Tenerife.title: Multi-pitch climbing on the Teide volcano
Tenerife.note: Route-level beta on several Teide/Anaga multi-pitch trad and bolted lines (La Catedral, Roques de Guillermo, 7 Estrellas Verdes, La Directa Rusa).

Tenerife.title: Las Cañadas / Parque Nacional del Teide climbing guide
Tenerife.note: Local Spanish-language guide to the Teide National Park sectors (El Capricho, Los Cachorros, La Catedral) and access via the Parador Nacional del Teide.
